1814680.name: All Hit All Her: Western City
1814680.description:
With All Hit All Her: Western City, the adventure continues with all its excitement.
With this dlc, you will fight against bandits trying to take over your city in the wild west lands.
New section designs, different enemy types and behaviors, new weapons, new items have been added.
Are you up for a new action-packed adventure?
If yes, download and play this game now, don't miss it.

Again you will need the key to open the locked doors.
After you get the key, you need to go to the locked door and press enter.
If you have the correct key, the door will open.
If the door does not open, use the key on another door.
